description: As Daisy tries to reach Simmons, she is captured by the Kree, discovering Deke has betrayed her to Kasius for a reward. Kasius marvels at the appearance of "Quake, Destroyer of Worlds," and Daisy, before being gassed and passing out, vows vengeance against Deke, promising she will kill him for his actions.

transcript.line: You were right. It's a rare occasion that I am surprised, but count this among them.

I told you she'd find her way down here. And demonstrating her powers, no less. That right there is a weapon of mass destruction, tied up in one pretty, little package, all for you. We can talk about price later, but I expect that you'll be more than fair.
So, this is Quake, Destroyer of Worlds. How is it possible that she's here?
The important thing is, she's yours.
Sorry, sweetheart. I'm just playing the long game.
